job_description: This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We arecurrently looking for a Sovereign AI Enterprise Architect. In this pivotal role,you will spearhead the architecture strategy for sovereign AI solutions,ensuring compliance with national regulations while delivering secure andhigh-performing platforms. As a trusted advisor, you'll bridge customer visionand technical execution, unlocking the full potential of AI responsibly. Yourexpertise will guide organizations through the complexities of AIinfrastructure, fostering innovation and performance optimization.Accountabilities * Design end-to-end sovereign AI architectures, including model lifecycle, data pipelines, and governance frameworks. * Embed responsible AI principles, security-by-design, and compliance into every solution. * Advise C-suite and technical leaders, translating complex requirements into actionable roadmaps. * Stay ahead of global AI sovereignty trends and contribute to industry-leading insights. Requirements * 10+ years in enterprise IT, cloud, AI/ML, or data/analytics. * Expertise in AI/ML architecture, MLOps, security/privacy frameworks, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP/GreenLake). * Strong communication skills to influence senior stakeholders. * Familiarity with sovereignty regulations (EU AI Act, GDPR, FedRAMP, etc.) is a plus. Benefits * Work at the forefront of AI innovation. * Collaborate with global experts shaping digital sovereignty. * Hybrid flexibility and opportunities for growth. * Comprehensive benefits supporting physical, financial, and emotional wellbeing. * Investments in personal and professional development. * An inclusive work environment celebrating individual uniqueness. Why Apply Through Jobgether?We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewedquickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Oursystem identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shareddirectly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews,assessments) are managed by their internal team.We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge thatJobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and sharerelevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based onlegitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable dataprotection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access,rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiringprocess, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessingresponses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace humanjudgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you wouldlike more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.Show more Show less

job_description: About The ProjectJoin Neurons Lab as Senior Solution Architect - the role combining technicalAI/ML and Cloud solutions development with cloud department operationalleadership. You'll lead day-to-day cloud operations (50%) while leading hands-onAI/ML implementations for BFSI clients (50%).Our Focus: We specialize in serving Banking, Financial Services, and Insurance(BFSI) enterprise customers with stringent compliance, security, and regulatoryrequirements. You'll architect and build mission-critical AI/ML systems whileensuring our cloud operations run smoothly - from AWS funding applications toteam capacity planning.This role is ideal for technical professionals who excel at both execution ANDcoordination. You'll manage AWS/GCP partnership operations (funding, governance,hiring coordination) while staying technically sharp through hands-on AI/ML andCloud architecture and implementation work.ObjectiveDeliver operational excellence and technical leadership across cloud operationsand AI/ML project delivery: * Cloud Operations Management: Maintain 95%+ AWS funding success rate, coordinate hiring pipeline, execute cloud governance processes, and support AWS/GCP partnership programs * AI/ML Technical Project Leadership: Design and implement production-grade AI/ML architectures on AWS for FSI clients, ensuring Well-Architected compliance and security best practices * Operational Efficiency: Streamline cloud department processes through automation, capacity planning, and cross-functional coordination * Knowledge Transfer: Create reusable IaC components, architectural patterns, and documentation that accelerate team capability Areas of Responsibility * Prepare funding application materials and communicate with AWS/GCP account teams * Coordinate recruitment pipeline: candidate tracking, interview scheduling, capacity planning * Execute Well-Architected Review scheduling and delivery coordination * Support competency applications with documentation and evidence collection * Design end-to-end cloud architectures for AI/ML/Agentic solutions * Calculate ROI, TCO, and cost-benefit analysis for proposed AI/ML solutions * Build production infrastructure using AWS CDK (primary) and Terraform * Develop Python applications: FastAPI backends, MLOps automation, data processing scripts * Lead small engineering teams (2-3 engineers) on project delivery Skills * Solution architecture with ability to translate business requirements into technical designs * AWS Well-Architected framework expertise and remediation experience * Cloud cost optimization, credits management, and consumption tracking * AWS/GCP partnership programs knowledge (PoC funding, MAP, Well-Architected Reviews) * Advanced Python programming for API development with FastAPI or Flask * Deploy infrastructure with Infrastructure as Code (AWS CDK and Terraform) * Hands-on experience with AWS Bedrock and Langchain or other AI agentic frameworks * Containerization for AI Applications (Docker, ECS, EKS) Knowledge * AWS Certified Solutions Architect Professional (required) OR AWS Certified Machine Learning - Specialty (required) * Working knowledge of AWS Partner Network structure and funding programs * Understanding of PoC funding, MAP program, and ISV Workload Migration * Well-Architected Review process and delivery methodology * AWS competency requirements and evidence collection Experience * 5+ years in cloud architecture, solution architecture, or cloud engineering roles * 2+ years working with AI/ML workloads on cloud platforms * Proven track record designing and implementing cloud solutions from scratch * Hands-on experience deploying and managing AI or Generative AI solutions in production Show more Show less

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONInformation TechnologyINDUSTRIESIT Services and IT Consulting
job_description: Role Overview:The AI Solution Architect (Power Platform Specialist) defines the solutionblueprint, integration contracts, security model, and ALM approach for scalabledelivery. They ensure the platform is governed, cost-efficient, and resilient,with clear boundaries between product teams and shared services. The first hirewill codify reference architectures and patterns that accelerate all futuresquads. Summary from source: Designs solution/ALM patterns, environment strategyand security; defines integration architecture for AI agents.Core Accountabilities: * Own end-to-end solution architecture and non-functional requirements (performance, resilience, security). * Define environment strategy, identity/role design, data loss prevention, and integration contracts. * Establish reference patterns for ALM, CI/CD, testing, telemetry, and cost management. * Review designs; chair architecture reviews and maintain a living architecture decision record (ADR). * Guide build-vs-buy decisions and simplify complexity through modularisation and reusability. * Coach developers and analysts; uplift engineering practices across squads.Experience & Qualifications: * Experienced hire with 10–12+ years across solution architecture and engineering, including 4+ years leading low-code/automation platforms at scale. * Deep security/governance understanding (authN/Z, data policies, segregation of duties). * Proven ability to produce reference architectures and lead design reviews.Ways of Working: * Operate with strong documentation and knowledge transfer; maintain playbooks and ADRs. * Participate in agile ceremonies; provide clear estimates and surface risks early. * Measure outcomes; use data/telemetry to guide continuous improvement. * Mentor juniors and model engineering and governance best practices.Technical Skills & Software: * Azure AI Foundry: solution blueprints, agent orchestration, deployment governance. * RAG architecture design: retrieval layers, grounding sources, vector databases/knowledge bases; latency and cost considerations. * Microsoft Power Platform: environment strategy, ALM patterns, DLP. * Microsoft Copilot Studio: multi-channel bot architecture and guardrails. * CI/CD and ALM: Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions; release management and segregation of duties. * Security and compliance: AuthN/Z, secrets management, DLP, Microsoft Purview alignment. * Observability: design for Azure Monitor/Application Insights, SLOs, cost management. * Reference architecture and ADR tooling; architecture review cadence.What we offer: * High-quality external and internal technical training with a dedicated training department. * Reimburse certificates and tuition fees for qualifications that are part of your individual training and development plans.Monthly benefits package:Fixed benefits: * Recommendation Bonuses for new team members; * Private medical subscription; * Work from home allowance; * Transportation allowance; * Easter/Christmas bonus; * Bookster corporate library subscription; * Career development opportunities.Flexible benefits: * Meal tickets; * Vacation & cultural vouchers; * Retail vouchers (eMAG, IKEA).Show more Show less

job_description: 🚀 About NeodustriaNeodustria is building the Unified Cloud Platform for Next-GenerationEngineering, where AI, physics-aware simulation, and industrial automationconverge.We enable industrial innovators (automotive, construction, railway, naval,aerospace) to design, simulate, and optimize systems using SpecializedEngineering Models (SEMs) - reducing prototyping risks, acceleratingtime-to-market, and unlocking AI-assisted engineering at scale.This is not a research lab. This is production engineering for real industries.🎯 The RoleWe are hiring a Junior Platform Architect - a doer-architect who designs bybuilding.You will own and evolve production-grade platform architecture, sitting at theintersection of: * AI & physics-aware systems * Microservices & orchestration * Industrial simulation and digital twinsYou will write code, ship services, and operate platforms - not just drawdiagrams.🛠️ What You Will Build * Design and implement scalable microservices architectures * Develop high-performance APIs for simulation and AI pipelines * Orchestrate services on Kubernetes (Docker, Helm, CI/CD) * Integrate AI/ML systems (ML, DL, RL) into production workflows * Enable physics-aware AI (simulation-driven, surrogate models, digital twins) * Collaborate with simulation engineers (CFD, FEA, multi-physics) * Ensure observability, reliability, and performance at platform scale🧠 What You Must MasterCore Engineering * Golang (production APIs, concurrency, performance) * Python (AI/ML pipelines, orchestration, automation) * Microservices architecture (REST/gRPC, event-driven systems) * Docker & Kubernetes (real production usage) * PostgreSQL, APIs, distributed systemsAI & Industrial Intelligence * Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Reinforcement Learning * AI systems in production, not only research * 3D digital twins, simulation-driven workflows * Strong intuition for physics-aware AI systems🏭 Industrial DNA (Mandatory)You must have exposure to industrial domains, such as: * Automotive * Construction * Railway * Naval * Aerospace / AviationSimulation, digital twins, or physics-based systems experience is a strong plus.🧬 Our Engineering CultureWe optimize for execution density.You will thrive here if: * You prefer shipping code over debating abstractions * You design architectures by implementing them * You are comfortable owning systems end-to-end * You debug production issues instead of writing post-mortem slides * You believe “done” beats “perfectly discussed”✅ Requirements * 5+ years hands-on engineering experience * Proven ownership of production platforms * Strong coding skills in Golang and Python * Real experience with Kubernetes in production * AI/ML systems deployed beyond notebooks * Industrial or physics-aware system exposure🌍 Why Join Neodustria * Build a deep-tech industrial platform, not a SaaS wrapper * Work at the frontier of AI + simulation + engineering * High autonomy, high responsibility, real impact * Remote-friendly, Europe-aligned time zones * Fast growth environment for true buildersShow more Show less

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELNot ApplicableEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONEngineering and Information TechnologyINDUSTRIESSoftware Development
job_description: DescriptionJoin GlobalLogic’s Architects Team within the Healthcare Business Unit,supporting clients across the EMEA region. This strategic role focuses onengaging new clients, designing advanced AI solutions for medical imageanalysis, and launching projects involving computer vision, deep learning, andgenerative AI. You’ll work on cutting-edge use cases like diagnostic assistance,surgical planning, and radiology automation, bringing meaningful impact topatient care. If you’re passionate about AI in healthcare and want to driveinnovation with real-world results, we’d love to hear from you.Requirements * Master’s or PhD in Computer Science, AI, Biomedical Engineering, or a related field. * 7+ years of experience in AI/ML with at least 4 years focused on computer vision and deep learning. * Proven experience with CNN architectures (e.g., ResNet, UNet, EfficientNet, VGG). * Experience with GANs (e.g., CycleGAN, StyleGAN, Pix2Pix) and synthetic image generation. * Hands-on with TensorFlow, PyTorch, OpenCV, and related vision libraries. * Strong understanding of preprocessing techniques for medical imaging data (e.g., DICOM, NIfTI). * Familiarity with training in cloud environments (Azure, AWS, GCP). * Experience in deploying models and integrating with PACS systems or cloud-native imaging stacks. * Solid understanding of model performance metrics and validation strategies for imaging. * Excellent communication skills and at least Upper-Intermediate English level. Preferred Qualifications (Nice To Have) * Experience with FDA/CE Class B or C medical imaging products. * Familiarity with explainable AI (Grad-CAM, LIME) and fairness techniques for imaging models. * Knowledge of FHIR, HL7, and healthcare data standards. * Understanding of HIPAA, GDPR, or other relevant data protection regulations. * Experience with AI for surgical robotics, augmented reality in healthcare, or histopathology image analysis. * Involvement in technical presales or client advisory initiatives. Job responsibilities * Design, develop, and optimize AI models for computer vision, segmentation, objects detection, image classification, etc. * Lead computer vision and AI solutioning in client engagements and presales discussions. * Build CNN- and GAN-based architectures tailored for healthcare and medical imaging use cases. * Prepare and preprocess large-scale datasets from modalities like X-ray, CT, MRI, and digital pathology. * Guide annotation strategies and quality control for labeled data. * Collaborate with cloud, DevOps, and QA teams to integrate models into production pipelines. * Ensure model robustness, explainability, and regulatory readiness (e.g., traceability, reproducibility). * Conduct technical workshops and communicate complex concepts to clients in an accessible way. * Stay current with research trends and evaluate new techniques for potential integration. * Contribute to internal accelerators, frameworks, and IP development. What we offerCulture of caring. At GlobalLogic, we prioritize a culture of caring. Acrossevery region and department, at every level, we consistently put people first.From day one, you’ll experience an inclusive culture of acceptance andbelonging, where you’ll have the chance to build meaningful connections withcollaborative teammates, supportive managers, and compassionate leaders.Learning and development. We are committed to your continuous learning anddevelopment. You’ll learn and grow daily in an environment with manyopportunities to try new things, sharpen your skills, and advance your career atGlobalLogic. With our Career Navigator tool as just one example, GlobalLogicoffers a rich array of programs, training curricula, and hands-on opportunitiesto grow personally and professionally.Interesting & meaningful work. GlobalLogic is known for engineering impact forand with clients around the world. As part of our team, you’ll have the chanceto work on projects that matter. Each is a unique opportunity to engage yourcuriosity and creative problem-solving skills as you help clients reimaginewhat’s possible and bring new solutions to market. In the process, you’ll havethe privilege of working on some of the most cutting-edge and impactfulsolutions shaping the world today.Balance and flexibility. We believe in the importance of balance andflexibility. With many functional career areas, roles, and work arrangements,you can explore ways of achieving the perfect balance between your work andlife. Your life extends beyond the office, and we always do our best to help youintegrate and balance the best of work and life, having fun along the way!High-trust organization. We are a high-trust organization where integrity iskey. By joining GlobalLogic, you’re placing your trust in a safe, reliable, andethical global company. Integrity and trust are a cornerstone of our valueproposition to our employees and clients. You will find truthfulness, candor,and integrity in everything we do.About GlobalLogicGlobalLogic, a Hitachi Group Company, is a trusted digital engineering partnerto the world’s largest and most forward-thinking companies. Since 2000, we’vebeen at the forefront of the digital revolution – helping create some of themost innovative and widely used digital products and experiences. Today wecontinue to collaborate with clients in transforming businesses and redefiningindustries through intelligent products, platforms, and services.Show more Show less

job_description: DescriptionAI Agents for industrial equipment maintenance and management. AI based solutionfor field service engineers which perform maintenance and equipment tuning, andsetup. The solution covers a wide range of use cases, including predictivemaintenance, inventory management automation, work schedule management, andplanning.RequirementsRequired Skills and Qualifications * 10+ years of professional experience in software engineering, with at least 5 years operating specifically as an Enterprise Architect, Solutions Architect, Principal Engineer, or similar architecture-focused role. * Proven experience in architecting, designing, and overseeing the implementation of large-scale, complex AI / Data / Cloud platform programs involving multiple cross-functional teams and external vendors. * Strong understanding of modern SDLC methodologies (Agile, CI/CD, DevSecOps) and distributed system design principles. * Hands-on experience with Azure/GCP cloud architecture, containerization, and API gateway-based microservice ecosystems. * Hands-on experience in building on-prem based solutions which can work in isolated/air-gaped environments. * Hands-on experience in building applications and services which are running on top of Kubernetes. * Demonstrated experience in multi-vendor program governance, including delivery coordination, RACI ownership, and risk management. * Deep understanding of data pipelines, ingestion frameworks, and AI/ML integration concepts. * Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills; able to interface effectively with both engineering and executive audiences. * Strong analytical, problem-solving, and conflict-resolution abilities in complex delivery environments. Must have a track record of driving technical consensus on high-stakes architectural decisions. Preferred Qualifications * Background in AI-driven platforms, AI Agents, ML based solutions. Familiarity with Azure AI Foundry or Google Agentspaces. * Experience in cross-organization alignment (client–vendor–partner triangle). * Experience in leading engineering teams. * Experience in managing globally distributed teams. Collaborate with other tech leads toensure scalability, security, and compliance with policies and guardrails.Conduct deep technical reviews to ensure all implementations adhere to theapproved system architectureCross-Team Alignment: Manage dependencies across internal and external teams.Lead coordination of milestones, risks, and change management to maintainsynchronization across all partners.Stakeholder Management: Serve as a senior engineering counterpart for clientstakeholders, ensuring transparency, accountability, and clear communication onprogress, blockers, and technical decisions.Resource & Capacity Planning: Own capacity planning and workload distributionacross engineering domains. Anticipate resource constraints, propose mitigationplans, and support staffing decisions.Quality & Risk Management: Monitor engineering performance through metrics andKPIs. Identify risks early, ensure mitigation steps are tracked, and maintainquality assurance across all deliverables.Innovation & Continuous Improvement: Promote automation, reusable components,and AI-assisted engineering practices. Encourage continuous improvement throughlessons learned and engineering retrospectives.Team Leadership & Mentorship: Build and nurture a strong engineering culture.Provide mentorship to technical leads and senior engineers, fostering growth,ownership, and accountability.What we offerCulture of caring. At GlobalLogic, we prioritize a culture of caring. Acrossevery region and department, at every level, we consistently put people first.From day one, you’ll experience an inclusive culture of acceptance andbelonging, where you’ll have the chance to build meaningful connections withcollaborative teammates, supportive managers, and compassionate leaders.Learning and development. We are committed to your continuous learning anddevelopment. You’ll learn and grow daily in an environment with manyopportunities to try new things, sharpen your skills, and advance your career atGlobalLogic. With our Career Navigator tool as just one example, GlobalLogicoffers a rich array of programs, training curricula, and hands-on opportunitiesto grow personally and professionally.Interesting & meaningful work. GlobalLogic is known for engineering impact forand with clients around the world. As part of our team, you’ll have the chanceto work on projects that matter. Each is a unique opportunity to engage yourcuriosity and creative problem-solving skills as you help clients reimaginewhat’s possible and bring new solutions to market. In the process, you’ll havethe privilege of working on some of the most cutting-edge and impactfulsolutions shaping the world today.Balance and flexibility. job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEContractJOB FUNCTIONDesign, Art/Creative, and Information TechnologyINDUSTRIESIT Services and IT Consulting
job_description: About The Project (description, Duration, Stage)You'll be joining Neurons Lab as a Senior AI Solutions Architect, workingdirectly with our Head of AI Engineering to scale our FSI-only AI consultancy.This role is critical for supporting our existing client relationships whilebuilding technical capacity for our custom LLM solutions and AI-powered businessprocess transformation projects.Objective * Support business development through technical expertise and client communication * Enable engineering team growth and high-performance delivery * Contribute to critical AI system architecture and implementation KPI * Achieve 90%+ Customer Satisfaction Index (CSI) on technical delivery * Support team performance improvement and capability development * Deliver scalable AI system architectures that meet FSI compliance requirements Areas of ResponsibilityBusiness Development Support * Communicate project progress with customers, explaining business and technology logic clearly * Prepare upsell and account expansion ideas for existing clients * Assist in proposal preparation for new client engagements Engineering Team Enablement * Lead AI Engineers on customer projects, create tasks, control performance and share feedback * Help engineering team grow, identify and support high-performers * Participate in performance reviews and performance improvement plans Technical Architecture & Implementation * Take part in critical software pieces implementation * Define how AI transforms business processes; design end-to-end AI-powered experiences * Design scalable AI systems architecture; decide on model selection, deployment patterns, and infrastructure requirements * Bridge business stakeholders and technical teams; translate business needs into technical specifications * Design how multiple AI agents/models work together; define agent-to-agent communication protocols * Establish AI development standards, safety protocols, and compliance frameworks * Design systems for AI safety, bias mitigation, and failure modes; implement monitoring and intervention systems SkillsTechnical Excellence * AI system architecture design and implementation * Model selection and deployment pattern expertise * Multi-agent system design and communication protocols * AI safety and compliance framework development * Business process transformation through AI Leadership & Communication * Advanced written and oral communication in English * Technical team leadership and performance management * Business stakeholder communication and requirement translation * Client relationship management and technical explanation abilities Experience * 7+ years of hands-on AI/ML solutions development * 3+ years of technical leadership in AI project delivery * 2+ years of team management and performance development * Demonstrated success in designing scalable AI systems for enterprise clients * Experience working with financial services clients Show more Show less
title: AI Architect (BFSI domain)

job_criteria: SENIORITY LEVELMid-Senior levelEMPLOYMENT TYPEFull-timeJOB FUNCTIONInformation TechnologyINDUSTRIESIT Services and IT Consulting
job_description: Solution Architect – Modern Engineering & AutomationWe’re looking for a Solution Architect who combines strong engineeringfundamentals with curiosity for modern AI, automation, and agentic systems. Youdon’t need deep AI expertise on day one — but you should have experiencebuilding large-scale systems in Java, Python, or JavaScript/TypeScript and beeager to grow into next‑gen AI architectures.This is a hands-on, technical leadership role within our new Agentic AI &Process Automation Centre of Excellence, shaping how AI-powered agents,enterprise systems, and automation workflows transform business and IToperations.What You Will DoArchitect intelligent and agentic platforms * Design end-to-end architectures for conversational, automation, and multi‑agent systems. * Define how AI agents interact with enterprise tools, APIs, and human users. * Create secure, scalable patterns for knowledge retrieval and workflow automation. * Produce architecture diagrams and documentation for engineering and customer teams. * Ensure solutions are resilient, observable, secure, and production-ready.Partner with customers * Lead discovery sessions to understand goals, systems, and constraints. * Shape AI architecture for proposals, SoWs, and solution options. * Communicate complex concepts to both technical and business audiences. * Support PoCs and pilots to validate feasibility and value. * Guide customers from simple automation toward agentic ecosystems.Research & continuous improvement * Stay current with emerging AI models, frameworks, and tools. * Evaluate new tech through structured tests and experiments. * Contribute to reusable patterns, playbooks, and best practices. * Optimize for cost, scale, and performance.Embed governance & compliance * Incorporate guardrails, access control, and responsible‑AI principles. * Work with security and compliance teams to meet enterprise standards. * Define observability, auditability, and incident‑response requirements.What You BringBackground in roles such as Solution Architect, Software Architect, CloudArchitect, Integration Architect, or Lead Engineer, with strong expertise inJava, Python, or JavaScript/TypeScript.Experience with: * Distributed systems, APIs, and automation workflows. * Cloud-native architectures (Azure/AWS/GCP). * Prototyping and building PoCs. * Identity, security, and data protection. * Monitoring, observability, and operational readiness.You are: * Curious about modern AI patterns. * Comfortable experimenting and learning fast. * Skilled at simplifying complexity. * Able to balance strategy with hands-on work. * Excited to help shape a new Centre of Excellence.Show more Show less
title: Agentic AI Architect
